LanguageData.Mech2000Coming.label: Mechanoid Airdrop
LanguageData.Mech2000Coming.description: B2000 will continuously airdrop Mechanoid Centipedes onto the battlefield until the Static Nest Construct is destroyed.
LanguageData.Mech2000Coming.letterText: The Mechanoid Airdrop has started! B2000 will continuously airdrop Mechanoid Centipedes onto the battlefield until the Static Nest Construct is destroyed.
